---
title: "Privacy Law Roundup — July 17, 2026"
date: 2026-07-17 10:55:48 +0530
categories: [news, roundup]
tags: [dpdpa, india, privacy, global, news]
---

## India: Regulatory Updates

The Digital Personal Data Protection Rules, 2025, have been finalized and are now set for official publication, marking a crucial step towards the full implementation of India's privacy framework. This development follows IT Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw's confirmation of their readiness. ([News On AIR](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxQakx6Y1RYS0lCdGEzN1VfZENmenhLRVZRWUViVUNwZHRCZzhZbDJFYkN4UUdOb1NKZzFKUHdIQnRxWDVINnhTaWY5Ml9IUFppTW44ZkVZeTFzTndwaUo2bl9GYmpHU3U4dkV5UEtGbHdXbG93OGs4QXBSQ3I5Ums5SDFGREdYRHdJQXp2YkpzcTVHaC0wLV9qaDlRRnp2Y25obXhIQVdjSHhsbjZFa0wwTA?oc=5))

In a significant move towards operationalizing the DPDPA, MeitY has initiated the process of appointing key personnel by inviting applications for the Chairperson and members of the Data Protection Board of India. This signals the imminent establishment of the regulatory body responsible for enforcement. ([Indian Television](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiyAFBVV95cUxOaVR4MW9NWUdLSkM5eEVJNFlNeWJBVVRRNzhaU3d0VGdlMlh0V0ExNlNrU2lUdllVMGpYdFFGQ3lIZ1kyOEFIbXNlWks2cHFSX2lTRlB4d1gxY1NDbU1FV3NfRFVYYTB2V29haVpVTEYyWmtDeHFHLURaYnZyaUtlTlptazN3dTc0cVVIajJoenhPTEVCRTFLZjlfVW94OU1YT0U5RWV2VjdZNnJULUlqd1ViM2RBQm02Ti1GTVpWc1hPNnUwZk5XdA?oc=5))

MeitY and NeGD recently concluded the DPDP Innovation Challenge, with IDfy emerging as a winner for its privacy-enhancing solutions. This initiative underscores the government's push to foster technological advancements that support data protection compliance in India. ([TheWire.in](https://news.google.?oc=5))

## India: Legal Challenges & Interpretation

The Supreme Court has issued notices concerning petitions challenging the constitutionality of both the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023, and the recently published Digital Personal Data Protection Rules, 2025. This legal scrutiny introduces potential uncertainties regarding the future trajectory and implementation of India's data protection regime. ([Internet Freedom Foundation (IFF)](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Supreme Court Observer](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxNUXo3aUxwM1dVSWIzOUg4dzgtSkEtS210VFhhTkVIeS1KSHU4cHI0Vkd1enlUd0JKTmxHbTlpbDJyWVhPQmwzRWlpZnNXemZUcXRnOG51X0RYbGhYMEl
